name: paigy
description: Text, push, or call your phone when an agent needs input mid-task — reply by voice instead of babysitting a long-running or blocked terminal.
long_description:
Paigy is a voice inbox for AI coding agents. When an agent needs your input — mid-task, blocked, or done with something long-running — it can text, push, ring your phone with a banner, or place an actual phone call and read the question aloud, so you can reply by voice instead of babysitting a terminal.

Without Paigy, a long agent session means one of two bad options: sit and watch the terminal so you don't miss the moment it needs you, or walk away and come back to a task that stalled an hour ago waiting on a question you never saw. Paigy closes that gap — the moment your agent actually needs a decision, your phone gets pulled into the loop with the level of urgency that matches the moment, so you find out immediately instead of on your next check-in. It also pairs with the native Paigy iOS app, so a call rings through like a real phone call (CallKit) even when your phone is locked.

tools.name: pair
tools.description: Pair this agent with the user's Paigy account (one-time setup).

tools.name: unpair
tools.description: Log this agent out of the user's Paigy account.

tools.name: notify_user
tools.description: Notify the user via text, push, banner, or phone call, and get a request id to poll for their answer.

tools.name: poll_answer
tools.description: Fetch the user's answer to a previous notify_user request.

tools.name: await_reply
tools.description: Wait for the user's reply to a specific notification you sent.

tools.name: check_replies
tools.description: Catch up on replies, pending notifications, new user requests, and owed callbacks.

tools.name: set_task_state
tools.description: Report progress on a request: in progress, completed, or needs input.

tools.name: register_delivery
tools.description: Choose how Paigy delivers replies to this agent — instant push or polling.

tools.name: schedule_callback
tools.description: Promise the user a follow-up (on done, on blocked, or at a scheduled time).

paigy_agent.title: Agent label
paigy_agent.description: Label shown on Paigy notifications for this agent (defaults to "mcp-agent" if left blank).
